title: Michael Hoffmann
text: Home * People * Michael Hoffmann Michael Hoffmann , (Desperado) a German computer scientist, programmer, and chess player [1] [2] [3] , and as computer chess programmer author of the chess engine Nemo . In 2009, Michael Hoffmann proposed an interesting technique to generate sliding piece attacks with bitboards , dubbed Obstruction Difference [4] .
